description.one_line: The patient reader who thrives on massive documents and deep context.
description.full: The patient reader who thrives on massive documents and deep context.

usage_guidance.when_to_use: Reading 100+ page PDFs, comparing multiple long documents, massive research.
usage_guidance.when_not_to_use: Quick, snappy tasks where long context is overkill.
usage_guidance.context_considerations: Pioneer of the 2M+ token limit — 'reads' the whole book.

differentiation.context_handling: Pioneer of the 2M+ token limit — 'reads' the whole book.
differentiation.truth_vs_speed: Slower retrieval, high fidelity on long ranges.
differentiation.cultural_anchor: China-developed, specialized in complex document structures.
